name: Email Format Validation
description: Validate email address format contains @ symbol and domain
errorMessage: [FIELD_LABEL] must be a valid email address (e.g., user@example.com).

examples.name: Contact Email Validation
examples.errorMessage: Email must be a valid email address (e.g., user@example.com).

examples.name: Lead Email Validation
examples.useCase: Ensure Lead email is properly formatted

examples.name: Custom Email Field Validation
examples.errorMessage: Billing Contact Email must be a valid email address.

testCases.name: Should fail validation (no @ symbol)
testCases.errorMessage: Email must be a valid email address (e.g., user@example.com).

testCases.name: Should pass validation (email is blank)
testCases.note: Blank emails are allowed (not required). Use conditional-required template to make email required.

variations.name: Basic Email with Domain Check
variations.description: Check for @ and at least one period

variations.name: Email with Domain Validation
variations.description: Check for specific domain format (.com, .net, etc)
variations.formula:
AND(
  NOT(ISBLANK(Email)),
  OR(
    NOT(CONTAINS(Email, "@")),
    NOT(OR(
      CONTAINS(Email, ".com"),
      CONTAINS(Email, ".net"),
      CONTAINS(Email, ".org")
    ))
  )
)

bestPractices: Check for null/blank BEFORE format validation
Use CONTAINS() instead of complex REGEX for simple checks
Provide example email format in error message
Don't over-validate - basic @ and domain check is usually sufficient
Consider allowing blank emails if not required
commonPitfalls: Not checking for null/blank first (causes error)
Making validation too strict (blocks valid international emails)
Not providing example format in error message

deploymentConsiderations.impactAnalysis: Test against existing email values to identify invalid formats
deploymentConsiderations.rolloutStrategy: Consider staged deployment if many existing invalid emails
deploymentConsiderations.userCommunication: Provide examples of valid email formats
deploymentConsiderations.dataCleanup: Export and fix invalid emails before activating rule

monitoringMetrics: User complaints about valid emails being rejected

author: Salesforce Plugin Team
